title: Anatomy of a NumPy Structured Array
description: A visual breakdown of the core components that define a structured array and how they relate to each other to store complex, heterogeneous data.
relationships: The dtype is a list of (Field Name, Field Data Type) tuples. This blueprint defines the structure of each element. The Array of Structures is a contiguous block of memory (Memory Block) where each element is structured according to the dtype, allowing efficient access to individual fields by name.
